case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. YEE, PHILIP et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $123.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, PHILIP
